name: Seljuk Empire Countryhumans
description:
Art was (I think) posed by Матин Салехов on Pinterest, though idk who the real artist is.

(The colored text is clickable, by the way.)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Requested by @ArchAngel Gabriel

ᅠ

Morghi didam neshaste bar bāreye Tus

Dar pish nahāde kalleye Kay Kāvus

Ba kalle hami goft: avsoos, avsoos!

Koo bānge jarass-hā va kojā nāleye koos?

ᅠ

(Ya Allah! Ya Allah! Ya Allah!)

(Ya Allah! Ya Allah! Ya Allah!)

ᅠ

Ve cāhil gişileri gişi sanma, (Ya Allah!)

Ve hünersüzleri bilür sayma. (Ya Allah!)

ᅠ
